executive_summary: - Added PocketBase handler to integrate with MindsDB via REST API.
- Enables querying PocketBase collections using MindsDB SQL syntax.
- Includes authentication, table creation, and data manipulation features.
- Updates documentation and adds new files for clarity and maintenance.

change_units.title: Pocketbase Handler Integration
change_units.description: Adds a new handler to connect MindsDB with PocketBase collections.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to extend MindsDB functionality.
change_units.evidence: Commit #1675 - additional test for mysql api

risks_and_concerns: - Potential security risks if credentials are exposed in code.
- Complexity in maintaining both MindsDB and PocketBase configurations.
- Risk of breaking changes if existing MindsDB integrations are affected.
